name: saas-project-management-api
description: Multi-tenant SaaS Project Management System – Backend API

scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --watch seed-admin.ts --ext ts --exec "npm run build && node dist/src/server.js"
scripts.test: npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --runInBand dist/tests
scripts.test:watch: npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --watch dist/tests
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest --coverage --runInBand dist/tests
